message:
test(engine): expand edge-case and integration test coverage across 48 test files

Major test expansion (+2745/-1169 lines) covering new and existing
functionality:

Edge-case tests: anti_entropy, attested_execution_cell,
baseline_interpreter, compiler_policy, conformance_catalog,
conformance_vector_gen, cross_repo_contract, cx_threading, error_code,
expected_loss_selector, extension_host_authority_guard,
extension_lifecycle_manager, fleet_immune_protocol, forensic_replayer,
key_attestation, one_lever_policy, opportunity_matrix,
plas_benchmark_bundle, policy_theorem_compiler, portfolio_governor,
privacy_learning_contract, recovery_artifact, release_gate,
replacement_lineage_log, revocation_chain, safe_mode_fallback,
saga_orchestrator, shadow_evaluation_gate, tee_attestation_policy,
third_party_verifier, threshold_signing, translation_validation,
trust_economics

Integration tests: attestation_handshake, feature_parity_tracker,
frankenlab_release_gate, guardplane_calibration,
interleaving_explorer, marker_stream, plas_burn_in_gate,
plas_lockstep, policy_controller, principal_key_roles,
proof_ingestion, reputation, revocation_chain,
saga_orchestrator, static_authority_analyzer

Extension-host tests: capability_escrow_adversarial,
delegate_cell_edge_cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
